aboutPage.title: Frontend Developer
aboutPage.p1: I am passionate about programming, with experience in creating web applications.
aboutPage.p2: I am specialized in technologies like HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript and Libraries like React.

goals.title: Goals
goals.p1: My main goal is to create innovative solutions that improve the user experience and optimize business processes.
goals.p2: Work on challenging projects that allow me to use my knowledge to satisfy the user experience.

descriptions.pokedex: A web app where you can interact with the information of the pokemons
descriptions.rickAndMorty: A web app where you get all the characters that appear in the series depending on their universe
descriptions.userCards: Mini game where you can create users and interact with user cards
descriptions.watherApp: A web app that shows you the weather status in real time, depending on your geographical location
descriptions.ecommerceVanilla: An Ecommerce created with Pure and hard code (Vanilla), simulating purchase, user creation, API call, etc.

skillPage.title: I have experience in
skillPage.p: These skills allow me to create attractive web interfaces, develop complete applications, efficiently collaborate on projects using version control with Github.
